ab: sanengi ay kaput ku nani, ti utay nangan na, kebalan qaya aizipna.
ch: 我的好朋友叫utay，他也是噶瑪蘭族。
en: My good friend’s name is utay, and he is also an kebalan child.

ab: masulun imi temaqsi ta damuan tasiamsiw.
ch: 我們一起在大峰峰部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Tasiamsiw tribe.

ab: pataz imi masulun mipil tu baqi pakungku timaimian, niz imi mesuppaR temankebalan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說噶瑪蘭語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the kebalan proficiently.

ab: ibabaw, missi iku, ilibeng, qiwat ti utay.
ch: 我很高也很胖，utay很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while utay is short and thin.

ab: medaduna ti utay, qalizaqan na meniz.
ch: utay很有勤勞，大家都很喜歡他。
en: utay is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
